hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$repo" ] && cd "$repo" && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -4 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "auto-save: $files" && git push origin main && echo "[auto-commit] pushed: $files"; fi
